prestazioni: Engine swap to a 4G63T (from the Mitsubishi Galant VR-4 or Evo I-III) with forged internals: Manley 87mm forged crank, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and JE 8.5:1 compression pistons, paired with a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a Tomei 260° camshaft kit for optimized mid-to-high RPM power delivery.

Full custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power Spec-L, featuring a 70mm diameter piping with a single 3.5-inch titanium-tipped muffler (resonated for cabin comfort), paired with a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller and a custom-mapped ECU by Haltech Elite 2500 with flex-fuel capability for E85 tuning.

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (Libero GT-specific valving), reinforced with Cusco front and rear strut tower bars, Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (22mm), and Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings (full set) for improved chassis rigidity and cornering precision.
estetica: Libero GT-specific Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (fiberglass construction) with custom front canards and a duckbill rear spoiler, finished in Mitsubishi Racing Green (MRG) with matte black accents and a 3M Gloss Black vinyl roof wrap.

OEM+ JDM-style front bumper lip from C-West (Libero GT-specific fitment) with integrated fog light deletes, paired with a custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon) featuring a functional heat extractor and a relocated Mitsubishi Ralliart badge.

Interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (Libero GT-specific mounting brackets), a Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel (Momo quick-release hub), and a full custom roll cage by Auto Power (8-point, bolt-in) with red powder-coated finish and integrated harness bar for Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses.
